headline: Woman's Elbows Have A 'Tense Relationship,' Refuse To Bend At The Same Time
summary: The elbows have developed a 'non-aggression pact' and 'don't coordinate.'
fullBody: Amanda McElbows has discovered her elbows have a 'tense relationship.' 'They don't coordinate,' Amanda said. 'One bends, the other doesn't.' The elbows have developed a 'non-aggression pact.' Amanda has tried to coordinate them. 'They're not interested,' Amanda said. She now bends one elbow at a time. Her life is 'uncoordinated.'
